evidence.q1: Sections are numbered 1 through 16 sequentially; Section 1 cross-refs Section 5 and Section 4.
evidence.q2: "Assumed Liabilities" defined in Section 1, used in Section 5; "Excluded Liabilities" defined in Section 1 and Section 4.
evidence.q3: "Within 60 days after closing", "for 12 months after closing", "for 24 months after closing".
evidence.q5: "Buyer and Seller intend a purchase of assets and not a merger, consolidation, or equity acquisition."
evidence.q6: Consistent modern drafting: "Seller will sell to Buyer all assets..." and "Buyer may decide which Seller employees receive offers."
